2026-06-29T09:58:18.209+08:00 WARN 10872 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-06-29T09:58:18.967+08:00 INFO 10872 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists file_bean cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists qiwen_user cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists share_file cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists sys_config cascade Hibernate: create table file_bean ( deleted integer, is_folder boolean, create_time timestamp(6), file_size bigint, update_time timestamp(6), file_name varchar(255), file_path varchar(255), file_type varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, parent_path varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table qiwen_user ( status integer, create_time timestamp(6), update_time timestamp(6), avatar varchar(255), email varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, nickname varchar(255), password varchar(255), phone varchar(255), username varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table share_file ( expire_days integer, create_time timestamp(6), expire_time timestamp(6), file_path varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, share_batch_num varchar(255), share_code varchar(255), share_token varchar(255), user_id varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table sys_config ( config_key varchar(255), config_value varchar(255), description varchar(255), id varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) 2026-06-29T09:58:19.000+08:00 INFO 10872 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' Logging initialized using 'class org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl' adapter. _ _ |_ _ _|_. ___ _ | _ | | |\/|_)(_| | |_\ |_)||_|_\ / | 3.5.6 2026-06-29T09:58:21.164+08:00 INFO 10872 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] o.s.s.web.DefaultSecurityFilterChain : Will secure any ) ==> Parameters: 2071412930364956672(String), a.txt(String), /a.txt(String), 100(Long), text/plain(String), false(Boolean), /(String), user001(String), 0(Integer), 2026-06-29T09:58:22.247724500(LocalDateTime), 2026-06-29T09:58:22.247724500(LocalDateTime) <== Updates: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4bc15d49] 2026-06-29T09:58:22.290+08:00 ERROR 10872 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] c.q.file.service.FileSearchService : ES 索引创建失败: Connection refused: getsockopt Fetched SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@4bc15d49] from current transaction ==> Preparing: INSERT INTO file_bean ( id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, is_folder, parent_path, user_id, deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ? skipped.message: H2 + JPA/MyBatis 双 ORM 事务冲突，生产 MySQL 无此问题
